---
title: "tune_weights.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\tune_weights.py"
loc: 119
complexity: 26
logic_score: 1.85
style_score: 3.78
intel_score: 5.43
overall_score: 2.16
---

## Intent
The `tune_weights.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on MetaLearner, __init__, analyze_failure, report, apply_updates, WeightTuner, execute, _res. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via MetaLearner, __init__, analyze_failure, report, apply_updates, WeightTuner, execute, _res. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 24 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [collections](file://collections)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `MetaLearner`
- `__init__`
- `analyze_failure`
- `report`
- `apply_updates`
- `WeightTuner`
- `execute`
- `_res`
